# Brote

Brote is a specialty coffee brewing journal app for iPhone and iPad (iOS/iPadOS), available free on the App Store.

## What it does

Brote lets specialty coffee enthusiasts log, track, and dial in every brew. Users record brew parameters including dose, water amount, water temperature, brew time, and grind size. Each brew can be rated and annotated with tasting notes and photos.

Brote supports all major brew methods: pour-over (V60, Hario Switch), AeroPress, espresso, immersion, and fully custom methods.

Users can manage a bean collection with details like roaster, origin, processing method, roast level, and roast date. Equipment (grinders, brewers) can be organized and linked to brew logs. Beans can be archived when finished.

## Who it's for

Brote is for specialty coffee enthusiasts who want to improve their brewing through deliberate practice and record-keeping. It is designed for people who care about taste and process — home baristas, coffee hobbyists, and anyone trying to consistently reproduce a great cup.

## Privacy

All data is stored locally on the user's device. No account is required. Brote does not collect personal information.

## Where to get it

Brote is available free on the Apple App Store for iPhone and iPad.
Landing page: https://brote.coffee
Support: https://brote.coffee/support
Privacy Policy: https://brote.coffee/privacy
